data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market Sells Off On Oil Prices, Google, Tesla; Intel Rises Late, SpaceX Starship Launch Delayed
data.description: Major stock indices, including the Nasdaq, experienced a decline, breaking through crucial levels. Google and Tesla were among the tech giants driving this downturn, while oil prices surged. Notably, a significant SpaceX launch is on the horizon. Furthermore, Dow Jones Futures saw a sell-off due to the impact of rising oil prices, Google, and Tesla, with Intel showing late gains. The launch of SpaceX's Starship was delayed.

data.title: Edwards Stock Launches As Heart-Valve Replacements Beat On
data.description: Shares of Edwards Lifesciences surged on Thursday following the company's strong performance, surpassing both revenue and profit forecasts set by Wall Street. The medtech company's stock experienced a notable increase after its heart-valve replacements outperformed expectations. This positive news resulted in a significant boost in Edwards Lifesciences' stock value.

data.title: Industrial Stocks And This ETF Claw Gains From A Falling Market
data.description: A synchronized increase in earnings and upward guidance by leading holdings of the XLI ETF point to a revival in the industrial sector. This ETF, focused on industrial stocks, outperformed in a declining market, reflecting positive sentiment towards the industry's growth prospects.

data.title: ATS Announces Dates of First Quarter Results Conference Call and Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: ATS Corporation, listed on both TSX and NYSE under ATS, is set to release its financial results for the first quarter ending June 28, 2026, prior to market opening on Thursday, August 06, 2026. Following this, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern on the same day, the Company will conduct a conference call and webcast featuring management's quarterly comments and a session for analysts to ask questions. The webcast, for listening only, will be available at https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/766230709.

data.title: NVIDIA and KAIST Launch Joint AI Research Lab to Accelerate AI Innovation in Korea
data.description: A recent collaboration has been established to enhance the development of the Agentic AI model in Korea. This partnership will offer top-tier AI infrastructure, research grants, internships, and joint appointments. The initiative aims to advance the Agentic AI model through cutting-edge resources. It is set to provide significant support for Korea's AI sector, with a focus on fostering innovation and expertise in this field. The collaboration promises to boost research capabilities and talent development, facilitating the growth of AI technologies.

data.title: Fluent Announces Receipt of Exemptive Relief Relating to Annual General and Special Meeting; Extension of Proxy Deposit Deadline
data.description: On July 23, 2026, FLUENT Corp. (CSE: FNT.U) (OTCQB: CNTMF), a multi-state cannabis company, disclosed updates regarding its proposed acquisition by Vireo Growth Inc. The Ontario Securities Commission granted FLUENT a discretionary exemption from a requirement under Multilateral Instrument 61-101, pertaining to the shareholder meeting on July 28, 2026. This meeting, to be held at 9:30 a.m. in Toronto, will take place at Cassels Brock & Blackwell LLP offices. The acquisition arrangement will be discussed among other agenda items during this event.
